microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's enterprise **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing onboarding workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and deliver **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned drill execution to a scalable, repeatable model for enterprise customers.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months by instrumenting new testing best practices and surfacing critical hardware defects before they impacted production workloads.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, translating complex technical requirements into clear implementation plans.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring scheduling cycles to cut planning time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, freeing engineers to focus on higher-value performance and error analysis.

Developed best-practice documentation and workshop-level training content for partner engineering teams on resilience instrumentation, driving broader **SDK and tooling adoption** across enterprise accounts and improving time-to-value on new integrations.
microsoft_2023: Championed **developer tool adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, running hands-on demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based **YAML generation** by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating developer pain points into actionable requirements.

Improved **developer productivity** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting average lookup time by 83% and reducing friction in the software development life cycle.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, translating developer pain points into a shared onboarding and execution roadmap.

Drove discovery across 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical paths and improve developer productivity across the region deployment workflow.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and surface automation gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact improvements and accelerate time-to-value for enterprise region deployments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit OS migration by defining the full transition strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and creating implementation guides that kept developer workflows uninterrupted.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and triaged **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking cross-functional engineering teams to maintain deployment velocity throughout the migration program.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration model for future robotics platform releases.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM process that gave leadership real-time visibility into pipeline health and conversion rates.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted site conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to better reach developer and contractor audiences.

Improved leadership **pricing models** by analyzing financial profitability across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that tightened cost controls across high-volume service lines.
